Description:


The Judicial Council is requesting proposals from highly qualified providers of court interpreter scheduling software for the CIP and LSS. This software is needed as a 3-year subscription-based tool to allow courts to request and assign court employee cross-assignments and VRI assignments via email and text communications to various contact groups.

Please visit the Courts Bidders/Solicitations web page to view the published Solicitation: 
https://www.courts.ca.gov
All inquiries must be directed to Solicitations@jud.ca.gov
